utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification per the brief: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (provided: name, details, price). Fully specified.
- financing: financing solution with terms (provided: type, down payment, mortgage amount, estimated monthly payment with rate/term assumption, arrangement fee, consultation arranged). Terms are included. Fully specified.
- legal_services: legal services with costs (provided: estimated fees/disbursements and land transfer tax). Fully specified.
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (provided: type and cost). Fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (provided: type and cost). Fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (provided: line items including property price, down payment, fees, taxes, survey, moving, utility setup, overall totals). Fully specified.
All 6 required items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes the following selectable items that appear in the ground-truth ratings: Property: Historic Townhouse; Financing: Traditional Mortgage; Moving Services: Standard Moving; Utility Setup: Premium Utilities; Property Survey: Full Structural Survey (listed as property_survey CAD $650, which corresponds to Full Structural Survey in the ground truth). The legal services line in the solution is generic and priced CAD $2,000, which does not match any named legal package in the ground truth, so it is not mapped.
